is.t:
Er. Sanjay Babu CEng(I) B.E, Mtech (NITK), A.M.I.E Registered Valuer with Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI)[Under Companies Act-2013, Reg.No. IBBI/RV/11/2022/15183] Chartered Engineer (India)[Reg.No. AM-1997338] Engineer-A[Reg.No. E-11153/19/EA-4212/KLM]

c.f: CONCATENATE("Distress Value of Property as on ",Z18)

is.t: This document is a strictly confidential communication to and solely for the use of the recipient for the specific purpose and may not be reproduced or circulated without prior written consent. If you are not the intended recipient, you may not disclose or use the information in this documentation in any way.
Distance from National Highway / State Highway
Distance from National Highway / State Highway
Right of access as per title deed
Right of access as per title deed
Wheather the plot has clear access
Wheather the plot has clear access
North side is demarcated with compound wall, East side is demarcated with compound wall,
Level of plot relative to road
Level of plot relative to road
b.Electric Lines and Power Supply Systems
b.Electric Lines and Power Supply Systems
Wheather the plot is in the following areas
Wheather the plot is in the following areas
Wheather any High Tension wire lines are passing through or close to the property and if any adverse impact due to this.?
Wheather any High Tension wire lines are passing through or close to the property and if any adverse impact due to this.?

Stage of construction and Progress, if in the case of Construction Loan
Other Frames and Shutters with Country Woods, Fiber Doors

Deviations in built-up area, if any

c.f: CONCATENATE('101.Vlook Up'!C95," (",ROUND('101.Vlook Up'!C95/10.76,0)," Rate/ SqFt)", " [",'100.Motherdata'!Y65, " Lakh/Cent]",)

is.t: Note: All calculations are performed with precision to two decimal places.
All calculations are performed with precision to two decimal places.
*Value as per the estimate provided but not a part of Total Value, Since it is an estimation.
*Building estimate value in row no. 3 is provided for reference only and is not a part of Total Value.
The value of a property is influenced by the specific purpose of its valuation. Therefore, the client is advised to utilize this report solely for the specified purpose.
The value of a property is influenced by the specific purpose of its valuation. Therefore, the client is advised to utilize this report solely for the specified purpose.

The property's value is determined by the documents listed in Sec-1 of this valuation report. I have made every effort to gather all essential documents, but if any pertinent ones that influence the property's value are absent, the assessment may be incomplete and less precise. Please be aware that we cannot be held responsible for inaccuracies resulting from missing documents/information.

The property's value is determined by the documents listed in Sec-1 of this valuation report. I have made every effort to gather all essential documents, but if any pertinent ones that influence the property's value are absent, the assessment may be incomplete and less precise. Please be aware that we cannot be held responsible for inaccuracies resulting from missing documents/information.
Based on my appraisal and analysis, it is my considered opinion that the current market value of the aforesaid property, considering its prevailing condition and the specified specifications, is
Based on my appraisal and analysis, it is my considered opinion that the current market value of the aforesaid property, considering its prevailing condition and the specified specifications, is

c.f: CONCATENATE("The distress sale value of the property is assessed to be 80% of Rs. ",Q322," equals to Rs. ",ROUND(Q322*80%,2))

is.t: I hereby declare that I am not affiliated with the client/owner or any associated companies, nor have I had any direct or indirect involvement with the borrower in the past or present. I assert that this report has been prepared by me with the utmost professional integrity.

I hereby declare that I am not affiliated with the client/owner or any associated companies, nor have I had any direct or indirect involvement with the borrower in the past or present. I assert that this report has been prepared by me with the utmost professional integrity.
I further declare that all the above particulars and informations given in this report are true to the best of my knowledge and belif.
I further declare that all the above particulars and informations given in this report are true to the best of my knowledge and belif.
